name: Garlic Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine Bisquick and milk. Mix until just combined.
3. Stir in shredded cheese, chives, melted butter, minced garlic, and garlic powder.
4. Pour batter into a greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Turn off oven when biscuits are cooked through.
